moments.title: The 154th Open tees off
moments.blurb: The Open Championship, golf's oldest major, begins its 154th edition at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running from Thursday to Sunday.

angles.name: Classic Opener
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is up for grabs! The 154th Open Championship gets underway at Royal Birkdale this Thursday. Who are you backing for glory?

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is ready! The eyes of the golf world are on Southport as The Open Championship begins on Thursday. Expect big crowds and even bigger shots.

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: Get ready for four days of world-class golf! The Open Championship kicks off this Thursday, promising drama right through to Sunday's final round.

moments.title: The Hundred cricket season starts
moments.blurb: The Hundred, the fast-paced 100-ball cricket tournament, kicks off its sixth season on Tuesday, July 21st, with the opening double-header at The Kia Oval in London.

angles.name: New Season Buzz
angles.copy: It's almost time! The Hundred returns for its sixth season next Tuesday. Get ready for explosive cricket action and big entertainment.

angles.name: London Opener
angles.copy: London, are you ready for The Hundred? The new season gets underway at The Kia Oval next Tuesday with a thrilling double-header. Who are you supporting?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Cricket for all the family! The Hundred starts next week, bringing its unique brand of quickfire cricket and entertainment to stadiums across the UK.

moments.title: England Men's ODI vs India at Lord's
moments.blurb: England Men's Cricket team will take on India in a One-Day International at the iconic Lord's Cricket Ground in London on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Big Match Build-up
angles.copy: A huge clash at the Home of Cricket! England take on India in a Men's ODI at Lord's this Sunday. Who's got your backing?

angles.name: Lord's Atmosphere
angles.copy: The atmosphere at Lord's will be electric this Sunday as England face India in a one-day international. If you're going, soak it all in!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival begins
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, a celebration of traditional and contemporary Celtic music, arts, and culture, runs from July 15th to 18th in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides.

angles.name: Celtic Sounds
angles.copy: Get ready for a fantastic few days! The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off tomorrow in Stornoway, bringing incredible music and culture to the Outer Hebrides.

angles.name: Island Vibes
angles.copy: Heading to the Hebridean Celtic Festival? It all starts tomorrow! Enjoy the unique atmosphere and amazing line-up on the stunning Outer Hebrides.

moments.title: Splendour Festival in Nottingham
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's largest music festival, takes place this weekend, July 18th-19th, at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Nottingham Party
angles.copy: Nottingham, are you ready for Splendour? The city's biggest festival takes over Wollaton Hall this weekend! Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is just days away! Get set for a weekend of music and fun at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, starting Saturday.

moments.title: Latitude Festival celebrates 20 years
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary, brings music, comedy, arts, and culture to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th.

angles.name: 20 Years of Latitude
angles.copy: Happy 20th, Latitude! Henham Park is gearing up for another incredible festival, running from July 23rd to 26th. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Suffolk's Festival
angles.copy: Suffolk's biggest party is nearly here! Latitude Festival kicks off next week, promising four days of top-tier music, comedy, and arts.

moments.title: Together Again Festival in Cheshire
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival returns to Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24th to 26th, offering a weekend of music, arts, and family-friendly entertainment.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival
angles.copy: Together Again Festival is back! Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire hosts a fantastic weekend of music and fun from July 24th. Who's heading there?

angles.name: Family Fun Weekend
angles.copy: Looking for family festival fun? Together Again Festival at Bolesworth Castle kicks off next Friday with music, arts, and entertainment for all ages.

moments.title: Happy 59th to Will Ferrell
moments.blurb: American actor, comedian, writer, and producer Will Ferrell, known for iconic roles in films like 'Anchorman' and 'Elf', celebrates his 59th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Stay classy! Happy 59th Birthday to the one and only Will Ferrell this Thursday. What's your favourite Ferrell film?

angles.name: Film Quote Fun
angles.copy: It's a big birthday for Will Ferrell on Thursday! If you could only quote one of his movies for the rest of your life, which would it be?

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Sir Brian May, legendary guitarist and co-founder of Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, Sir Brian May, this Sunday! What's your favourite Brian May riff?

angles.name: Queen's Guitarist
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible talent of Sir Brian May, who turns 79 this Sunday! From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You', his guitar work is legendary.

moments.title: Slash's 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Saul Hudson, better known as Slash, the iconic lead guitarist of Guns N' Roses, will celebrate his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the legendary top hat-wearing guitar hero, Slash, this Thursday! What's your all-time favourite Guns N' Roses track?

angles.name: GnR Icon
angles.copy: Sweet Child o' Mine! Slash from Guns N' Roses turns 61 this Thursday. Celebrate with us by cranking up your favourite track featuring his iconic guitar solos.

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays for most schools in England and Wales officially begin around Wednesday, July 23rd, marking the start of the main break for students.

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: The countdown is on! Summer school holidays officially begin for many next Wednesday. What are your plans for the big break?

angles.name: Parent Survival Guide
angles.copy: Summer holidays starting next week for schools across England and Wales! Parents, you've got this. Any top tips for keeping the kids entertained?

angles.name: Scottish Holidays
angles.copy: Schools out for summer! Many Scottish schools are already enjoying their summer break, with others finishing up soon. What adventures are you having?
